---
title: "Joe Masterson Blog Spring 2026"
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
Welcome to my blog! Here you'll find posts about my projects from this semester.
I'm glad you stopped by feel free to browse around.
---
